heading: Omitted
label: 1300m–5 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for governance of the tribe by an Interim Council until adoption of a new tribal constitution and bylaws, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 103–454, title III, § 307108 Stat. 4795Nov. 2, 1994
